nodes.label: Views
nodes.description: Log10 of total view count. Primary outcome metric. All indicators ultimately trace back to this.

nodes.label: Hook Retention Pct
nodes.description: Retention at 10% into the video — measures hook strength. How many people are still watching 1/10 of the way through?

nodes.label: Final 5Pct Retention
nodes.description: Average retention in the final 5% of the video — end-completion signal. Videos that hold viewers to the very end.

nodes.label: Mid Video Cliff
nodes.description: Largest single-step drop in retention anywhere in the video — the worst moment of viewer loss.

nodes.label: Retention Entropy
nodes.description: Shannon entropy of the retention curve — information richness. High entropy means many peaks/valleys vs monotonic decline.

nodes.label: Hook Drop Rate
nodes.description: Slope of retention in the first 10% of video. More negative = viewers dropping faster right after start.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 5
nodes.description: Retention at 5% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 10
nodes.description: Retention at 10% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 15
nodes.description: Retention at 15% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 20
nodes.description: Retention at 20% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 25
nodes.description: Retention at 25% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 30% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 35
nodes.description: Retention at 35% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 40% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 50% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 60% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 70% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 90% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 95
nodes.description: Retention at 95% into the video.

nodes.description: Mean retention in the 0-25% window of the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 25 50
nodes.description: Mean retention in the 25-50% window of the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 50 75

nodes.description: Mean retention in the 75-100% window of the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 40 60

nodes.description: Linear regression slope of retention in the 0-25% window.

nodes.label: Retention Slope 25 50
nodes.description: Linear regression slope of retention in the 25-50% window.

nodes.label: Retention Slope 50 75
nodes.description: Linear regression slope of retention in the 50-75% window.

nodes.label: Retention Slope 75 100
nodes.description: Linear regression slope of retention in the 75-100% window.

nodes.label: Retention Slope 0 50
nodes.description: Linear regression slope of retention in the 0-50% window.

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 0 50
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in the 0-50% window (volatility).

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 50 100
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in the 50-100% window (volatility).

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 25 75
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in the 25-75% window (volatility).

nodes.label: Retention Pct 75
nodes.description: Retention at 75% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 85
nodes.description: Retention at 85% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 0 5
nodes.description: Mean retention in the 0-5% window.

nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in 70-80% window.

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 80 90
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in 80-90% window.

nodes.label: Opening Speech Rate 3S
nodes.description: Words per second in the first 3 seconds. Optimal ~7.5 words in first 3s.

nodes.label: Opening Speech Rate 5S
nodes.description: Words per second in the first 5 seconds — wider hook window.

nodes.label: Closing Speech Rate 5S
nodes.description: Words per second in the final 5 seconds — deliberate delivery at climax.

nodes.label: Speech Rate Q1
nodes.description: Words per second in the first quarter of the video.

nodes.label: Speech Rate Q4
nodes.description: Words per second in the final quarter of the video.

nodes.label: Speech Rate Ratio Q4 Q1
nodes.description: Ending pace / opening pace. <1 means slowing down (good for climax).

nodes.label: Speech Acceleration
nodes.description: Slope of speech rate over video — positive=speeding up, negative=slowing down.

nodes.label: Max Silence Gap S
nodes.description: Longest gap between consecutive words. Gaps >1.5s predict retention drops r=-0.73.

nodes.label: Silence Gap Count
nodes.description: Number of inter-word gaps exceeding 1 second — dead air frequency.

nodes.label: Silence Total Pct
nodes.description: Total silence time (gaps >0.5s) as fraction of video duration.

nodes.label: Opening Word Latency S
nodes.description: Seconds before the first word is spoken. Immediate speech = strong hook.

nodes.label: Peak Speech Rate 3S
nodes.description: Maximum words/sec in any 3-second sliding window — burst intensity.

nodes.label: Speech Tempo Range
nodes.description: Max speech rate minus min speech rate across 5s windows — dynamic range.

nodes.label: Avg Word Gap S
nodes.description: Mean time between consecutive words — overall delivery pace.

nodes.label: Word Density Variance
nodes.description: Variance in words-per-second across 5s windows — pacing consistency.

nodes.label: Sensory Word Density
nodes.description: Fraction of transcript words that are sensory/body words. Strongest positive language signal.

nodes.label: Technical Word Density
nodes.description: Fraction of transcript words that are technical/material words. Strongest negative language signal.

nodes.label: Sensory Technical Ratio
nodes.description: Ratio of sensory words to technical words. Higher = more engaging language.

nodes.label: Hook Sensory Word Count
nodes.description: Number of sensory/body words in the hook segment.

nodes.label: Body Sensation Word Pct
nodes.description: Percentage of words related to body sensations.

nodes.label: Pivot Word Count
nodes.description: Count of pivot/transition words (but, however, wait, instead, etc). r=+0.26 vs keep.

nodes.label: Pivot Word Density
nodes.description: Pivot words per 100 transcript words — normalized for length.

nodes.label: Hook Pivot Word Flag
nodes.description: Whether the hook contains at least one pivot word (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Short Word Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of words with 1-3 characters — simplicity signal. Vocab universality r=+0.323.

nodes.label: Long Word Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of words with 8+ characters — complexity/jargon signal.

nodes.label: Hapax Legomena Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of words appearing exactly once — vocabulary uniqueness.

nodes.label: First Person Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of first-person pronouns (I, me, my, mine, myself).

nodes.label: Second Person Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of second-person pronouns (you, your, yours). Research shows 'you' may hurt keep.

nodes.label: Action Verb Density
nodes.description: Fraction of words that are action/physical verbs.

nodes.label: Superlative Count
nodes.description: Number of superlative words — intensity signal.

nodes.label: Comparison Word Count
nodes.description: Count of comparison words (vs, than, better, worse, more, less).

nodes.label: Hook Speech Rate Wps
nodes.description: Words per second within the hook segment — hook delivery pace.

nodes.label: Hook Unique Word Ratio
nodes.description: Lexical diversity within the hook segment.

nodes.label: Hook Action Verb Count
nodes.description: Number of action verbs in the hook — immediate activity signal.

nodes.label: Hook Sentence Count
nodes.description: Number of sentences in the hook segment.

nodes.label: Hook Avg Word Length
nodes.description: Average word length in hook — vocabulary complexity.

nodes.label: Hook Number Count
nodes.description: Number of numeric tokens in the hook — specificity in opening.

nodes.label: Segment Duration Variance
nodes.description: Variance in segment durations — pacing uniformity.

nodes.label: Segment Count Per Minute
nodes.description: Segments per minute — structural density normalized by length.

nodes.label: Has Setup Segment
nodes.description: Whether AI identified a Setup segment (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Has Conclusion Segment
nodes.description: Whether AI identified a Conclusion segment (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Segment Type Count
nodes.description: Number of unique segment labels — narrative complexity.

nodes.label: Narrative Arc Completeness
nodes.description: Count of canonical arc elements present (hook, setup, main, climax, conclusion). 3/4=13M avg.

nodes.label: Climax Late Flag
nodes.description: Whether climax starts in the last 30% of the video (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Last Segment Duration Pct
nodes.description: Final segment as percentage of total duration — ending weight.

nodes.label: First Segment Duration Pct
nodes.description: First segment as percentage of total duration — opening weight.

nodes.label: Segment Length Ratio Max Min
nodes.description: Longest segment / shortest — pacing imbalance.

nodes.label: Body Segment Count
nodes.description: Segments that are not Hook or Conclusion — middle content density.

nodes.label: Hook Conclusion Combined Pct
nodes.description: Hook and conclusion combined as percentage of total duration.

nodes.label: Title All Caps Word Count
nodes.description: Number of ALL CAPS words in the title.

nodes.label: Title Emoji Flag
nodes.description: Whether the title contains any emoji character (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Title Contains Making
nodes.description: Whether the title contains 'making' or 'made'. Strongest concept keyword ($24M avg).

nodes.label: Title Avg Word Length
nodes.description: Average word length in the title.

nodes.label: Title Starts With Action
nodes.description: Whether the title starts with an action/gerund word (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Duration Optimal Flag
nodes.description: Whether duration falls in the 40-55 second sweet spot.

nodes.label: Duration Sweetspot Distance
nodes.description: Absolute seconds away from 52s sweet spot. Lower = better.

nodes.label: Description Word Count
nodes.description: Word count of video description.

nodes.label: Is Vertical
nodes.description: Whether the video is vertical format (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Upload Month
nodes.description: Month of upload (1-12) — seasonal effects.

nodes.label: Opening Frame Has Text
nodes.description: Whether the first frame has a text overlay (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Opening Frame Has Face
nodes.description: Whether the first frame shows a face (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Action Frame Pct
nodes.description: Percentage of frames with action/physical activity. Action frames enriched 1.9x at peaks.

nodes.label: Workshop Frame Pct
nodes.description: Percentage of frames showing workshop/tools setting.

nodes.label: Outdoor Frame Pct
nodes.description: Percentage of frames showing outdoor scenes. Outdoor 0.68x at peaks.

nodes.label: Face Alone Pct
nodes.description: Frames with face but NO action — talking head trap signal.

nodes.label: Face With Action Pct
nodes.description: Frames with BOTH face AND action — positive signal.

nodes.label: Object Focus Pct
nodes.description: Frames focused on objects rather than people.

nodes.label: Text Overlay Early Pct
nodes.description: Text overlay presence in first 25% of frames.

nodes.label: Dramatic Frame Pct
nodes.description: Frames with dramatic/intense descriptions. Dramatic enriched 1.8x at peaks.

nodes.label: Idea Word Count
nodes.description: Word count of the AI-generated video idea.

nodes.label: Idea Char Count
nodes.description: Character count of the video idea.

nodes.label: Summary Word Count
nodes.description: Word count of the AI-generated video summary.

nodes.label: Idea Question Flag
nodes.description: Whether the video idea contains a question mark (1=yes, 0=no).

nodes.label: Idea Number Flag
nodes.description: Whether the video idea contains a digit.

nodes.label: Idea Contains Making
nodes.description: Whether the idea contains 'making'/'build' concept keywords.

nodes.label: Idea Contains Indestructible
nodes.description: Whether the idea contains indestructible/unbreakable keywords.

nodes.label: Tension Word Density
nodes.description: Density of tension/conflict words (but, suddenly, impossible) per 100 words.

nodes.label: Resolution Word Density
nodes.description: Density of resolution/payoff words (finally, turns out, worked) per 100 words.

nodes.label: Tension Resolution Ratio
nodes.description: Ratio of tension to resolution words — narrative arc quality.

nodes.label: Emotional Arc Swing
nodes.description: Max tension-resolution swing across transcript quarters — emotional range.

nodes.label: Hook Tension Density
nodes.description: Tension word density specifically in the hook — immediate conflict signal.

nodes.label: Repeated Phrase Count
nodes.description: Number of bigrams repeated 3+ times — verbal callbacks and catchphrases.

nodes.label: Vocabulary Richness Yule K
nodes.description: Yule's K vocabulary richness measure. Lower = richer, more diverse vocabulary.

nodes.label: Question Early Ratio
nodes.description: Fraction of questions appearing in first 25% of transcript — front-loaded curiosity.

nodes.label: Open Loop Count
nodes.description: Count of open loops: questions + suspense phrases (but first, what if, wait).

nodes.label: Cliffhanger Density
nodes.description: Suspense/cliffhanger phrases per 100 words.

nodes.label: Visual Monotony Score
nodes.description: Fraction of consecutive frames with same scene — visual repetitiveness.

nodes.label: Visual Variety Entropy
nodes.description: Shannon entropy of scene descriptions — visual information richness.

nodes.label: Face Intro Delay Frames
nodes.description: Number of frames before first face appears — immediate vs slow face reveal.

nodes.label: Visual Pacing Variance
nodes.description: Variance of scene run lengths — chaotic vs steady visual pacing.

nodes.label: Golden Ratio Segment Flag
nodes.description: Whether any segment boundary falls at the golden ratio (61.8%) of video.

nodes.label: Hook To Body Word Overlap
nodes.description: Word overlap between hook and body — semantic coherence/foreshadowing.

nodes.label: Title Uniqueness Score
nodes.description: Number of uncommon (>6 char) words in title.

nodes.label: Title Curiosity Gap Score
nodes.description: Curiosity triggers in title: this, what, numbers, ellipsis, how.

nodes.label: Title Power Word Count
nodes.description: Count of proven viral power words in title (insane, impossible, extreme, etc).

nodes.label: Words Per Scene
nodes.description: Average transcript words per visual scene — information-per-scene density.

nodes.label: Speech Silence Ratio
nodes.description: Ratio of speaking time to silence time — pacing.

nodes.label: Transcript Readability
nodes.description: Flesch reading ease score — how accessible is the language?

nodes.label: Energy Word Density
nodes.description: High-energy/intensity words per 100 words (insane, epic, destroy, etc).

nodes.label: Concept Density
nodes.description: Unique capitalized words (nouns/names) per sentence — information density.

nodes.label: Frame Text Variety
nodes.description: Number of unique visual techniques mentioned across all frames.

nodes.label: Description Link Count
nodes.description: Number of URLs in video description — promotion effort proxy.

nodes.label: Description Hashtag Count
nodes.description: Number of hashtags in video description.

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 90 100
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in 90-100% window.

nodes.label: Retention Volatility 95 100
nodes.description: Std deviation of retention in 95-100% window.

nodes.label: Views Log Days 0 1
nodes.description: Log10 of total views in days 0-1.

nodes.label: Views Log Days 0 3
nodes.description: Log10 of total views in days 0-3.

nodes.label: Views Log Days 0 7
nodes.description: Log10 of total views in days 0-7.

nodes.label: Views Log Days 7 14
nodes.description: Log10 of total views in days 7-14.

nodes.label: Views Log Days 14 30
nodes.description: Log10 of total views in days 14-30.

nodes.label: Views Ratio Week2 Vs Week1
nodes.description: View ratio: days 7-14 / days 0-7.

nodes.label: Views Ratio Month1 Vs Week1
nodes.description: View ratio: days 0-30 / days 0-7.

nodes.label: Views Ratio Week3 Vs Week2
nodes.description: View ratio: days 14-21 / days 7-14.

nodes.label: Beat Count
nodes.description: Total narrative beats: segment transitions + tension words + questions. Proxy for story rhythm complexity.

nodes.label: Beat Density Per Minute
nodes.description: Beats per minute of video — rhythm density normalized by duration.

nodes.label: Beat Cadence Variance
nodes.description: Variance in spacing between beats — regular vs chaotic rhythm.

nodes.label: Beat Acceleration
nodes.description: Whether beats speed up (positive) or slow down (negative) over video.

nodes.label: First Beat Delay Pct
nodes.description: Position of first tension/pivot beat as percentage of video — how quickly story engages.

nodes.label: Scene Transition Spacing Mean
nodes.description: Mean frames between scene changes — average visual segment length.

nodes.label: Scene Transition Spacing Variance
nodes.description: Variance of inter-scene distances — regular vs irregular editing.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 1
nodes.description: Retention at 1% into the video.

nodes.label: Scene Transition Spacing Cv
nodes.description: Coefficient of variation of scene spacing — normalized editing regularity.

nodes.label: Scene Burst Count
nodes.description: Rapid-fire scene sequences: scene changes within 2 frames of each other.

nodes.label: Escalation Slope
nodes.description: Slope of tension/energy word accumulation over transcript — positive=building, negative=deflating.

nodes.label: Escalation Peak Position Pct
nodes.description: Position of peak tension word density as percentage of transcript — where energy peaks.

nodes.label: Escalation Late Surge
nodes.description: Tension words in last 25% minus first 25% — late escalation signal.

nodes.label: Deescalation Speed
nodes.description: How quickly tension resolves after peak — fast resolution vs lingering tension.

nodes.label: Face Action Alternation Rate
nodes.description: Rate of switching between face-focus and action-focus frames per minute.

nodes.label: Visual Mode Entropy
nodes.description: Shannon entropy of frame mode sequence (face/action/object/text) — visual unpredictability.

nodes.label: Visual Mode Dominant Pct
nodes.description: Fraction of frames in the single most common visual mode — dominance vs diversity.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 2
nodes.description: Retention at 2% into the video.

nodes.label: Object Face Transition Count
nodes.description: Number of transitions between object-focus and face-focus — demonstration style signal.

nodes.label: Text Overlay Burst Count
nodes.description: Number of text-heavy bursts (3+ consecutive frames with text) — information dump moments.

nodes.label: Text First Appearance Pct
nodes.description: Position of first text overlay as percentage of video — early vs late text introduction.

nodes.label: Text Density Q1 Q4 Ratio
nodes.description: Text overlay density in first quarter vs last quarter — front vs back text loading.

nodes.label: Text Gap Mean
nodes.description: Mean gap (frames) between text overlay appearances — text rhythm.

nodes.label: Title Compression Ratio
nodes.description: Characters per word in title — semantic compression (higher=denser words).

nodes.label: Title Contrast Word Count
nodes.description: Words in title that create contrast/opposition (vs, but, impossible, never).

nodes.label: Title Specificity Score
nodes.description: Numbers + proper nouns + material words in title — concreteness signal.

nodes.label: Title Verb Presence
nodes.description: Whether title contains a verb/action word (1=yes) — dynamic vs static framing.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 3
nodes.description: Retention at 3% into the video.

nodes.label: Narration Frontload Ratio
nodes.description: Words-per-second in first 30% / last 30% — front-loaded vs back-loaded narration.

nodes.label: Silence Before Climax S
nodes.description: Longest silence gap in the 60-80% region — dramatic pause before payoff.

nodes.label: Frame Cluster Count
nodes.description: Number of distinct visual clusters (groups of similar scenes) — scene diversity.

nodes.label: Dominant Cluster Pct
nodes.description: Fraction of frames in the largest visual cluster — visual concentration.

nodes.label: Cluster Transition Rate
nodes.description: Visual cluster transitions per minute — scene type switching rate.

nodes.label: Verbal Callback Count
nodes.description: Distinct phrases (2+ words) that appear in hook AND later — verbal callbacks.

nodes.label: Visual Return Count
nodes.description: Scene types that appear, disappear for 5+ frames, then return — visual callbacks.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 7
nodes.description: Retention at 7% into the video.

nodes.label: Motif Recurrence Score
nodes.description: Combined verbal + visual recurrence — total callback density.

nodes.label: Structural Thirds Balance
nodes.description: How evenly content distributes across thirds. 1.0 = perfectly balanced.

nodes.label: Hook Body Ratio
nodes.description: Hook duration / body duration — opening vs middle proportion.

nodes.label: Conclusion Weight
nodes.description: Conclusion segment as fraction of non-hook content — ending investment.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 12
nodes.description: Retention at 12% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 18
nodes.description: Retention at 18% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 22
nodes.description: Retention at 22% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 28
nodes.description: Retention at 28% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 33
nodes.description: Retention at 33% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 37
nodes.description: Retention at 37% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 42
nodes.description: Retention at 42% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 45
nodes.description: Retention at 45% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 48% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 52% into the video.

nodes.description: Retention at 78% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 82
nodes.description: Retention at 82% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 87
nodes.description: Retention at 87% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 92
nodes.description: Retention at 92% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 97
nodes.description: Retention at 97% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Pct 99
nodes.description: Retention at 99% into the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 0 3
nodes.description: Mean retention in the 0-3% window of the video.

nodes.label: Retention Mean 0 7
nodes.description: Mean retention in the 0-7% window of the video.

nodes.label: Hook Payoff Gap
nodes.description: Final 5% retention minus hook retention. NEGATIVE = over-delivery = 9x views.

nodes.label: End Recovery Score
nodes.description: Mean retention above linear baseline at 80-95%. Ending is 8.5x more important than hook.

nodes.label: Momentum Zone Length
nodes.description: Longest consecutive run above baseline — sustained engagement. Consistency beats spikes.

nodes.label: Retention Recovery Count
nodes.description: Number of times retention rises after a drop — resilience signal.

nodes.label: Above Baseline Area
nodes.description: Total area between retention curve and linear decay above baseline.

nodes.label: Below Baseline Area
nodes.description: Total area below the linear decay baseline.

nodes.label: Late Drop Severity
nodes.description: Average drop magnitude in the last 40%. Late drops are fatal.

nodes.label: Retention Concavity
nodes.description: Mean second derivative — concave up (decelerating loss) vs concave down.

nodes.label: Retention Quartile Spread
nodes.description: Mean retention Q4 / mean retention Q1 — how much retention degrades.

nodes.label: Early Late Drop Ratio
nodes.description: Drop magnitude first 30% vs last 30%. Later drops 2.15x steeper.

nodes.label: Engagement Rate
nodes.description: Total engagements per 1000 views. WARNING: may be partially circular.

nodes.label: Like To Comment Ratio
nodes.description: Likes / comments — passive vs active engagement balance.

nodes.label: Sub Nonsub Retention Gap
nodes.description: Subscriber avg% viewed minus non-subscriber — subscriber advantage.

nodes.label: Retention Variation Raw
nodes.description: Direct analytics.retentionVariation value.

nodes.label: Avg Percent Viewed
nodes.description: Direct analytics.avgPercentViewed — completion proxy.

nodes.label: Engaged View Rate
nodes.description: Engaged views / total views — quality viewer signal.

nodes.label: Sub View Fraction
nodes.description: Subscriber views / total views — base audience dependence.

nodes.label: View Day1 Share
nodes.description: Day 1 views as fraction of first 7 days — initial push strength.

nodes.label: View Week3 Week1 Ratio
nodes.description: Week 3 / Week 1 views — long tail signal.

nodes.label: Daily Views Entropy
nodes.description: Shannon entropy of daily views distribution — concentrated vs spread.

nodes.label: Daily Views Gini
nodes.description: Gini coefficient of daily views — inequality of distribution over time.

nodes.label: Stayed To Watch Rate
nodes.description: Direct swipeRatio.stayedToWatch — initial hook conversion.

nodes.label: Avg View Duration S
nodes.description: Direct analytics.avgViewDuration — raw watch time.
